case_title: DHYAN INVESTMENTS, LLC VS. KENNETH LAWRENCE ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DHYAN INVESTMENTS, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, KENNETH DENNY, KRISTEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 790 ELLIS STREET #202, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DHYAN INVESTMENTS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, KENNETH DENNY, KRISTEN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, KENNETH DENNY, KRISTEN
